summary: The blinds visible in the window view are white.

supporting_claims: In frame 1, the horizontal slats of the window blinds appear white.

uncertainties: Lighting is bright near the window, but the slats still appear clearly white rather than beige/gray.

evidence_items.claim: The horizontal window blinds are white.

tool_input.request_text: Need a view that includes the window/blinds; current frame shows fridge/wall only. Please provide keyframes where blinds or curtains are visible.

tool_trace.response_text: Added 2 new keyframe(s) for objects: [23, 15, 22, 25, 37]. New view IDs: [119, 166]. Total keyframes now: 3.
